text.message: Smh your asking to get solod on the 5 and now I have to race you to 9 now I have to race you to the 910
They get auto rebooked it was a smart play
guess you guys were right, my b. ill just solo black going forward
Idk if you want to battle there given our position in rolls
you picked the battle when you aggro knighted me
if youre just gonna aggro knight me anyway i have no incentive to not block you
That was my bad to be fair I’ll be more than happy to chill
You can just as easily keep
eh i mean i wouldnt say its easy
You have a city on all road tiles
yea the numbers are terrible tho
exactly why a solo is a terrible block there
i mean i knew it would b black eventually
so u solo me for shits and gigs or something

i mean u have road if u feel like taking it

I needed the steal to take road
